plugins.name: anton-toolkit
plugins.description: Personal toolkit with custom skills for Anton

plugins.name: lichnost
plugins.description: Personal life logging in the Obsidian vault: diary capture, film curation, and analytical period reviews

plugins.name: logos
plugins.description: Toolkit for designing the Logos autonomous AI assistant: a domain-specific architect council (orchestration, memory, models, autonomy, frontend, resources) that designs the architecture and details each system element into its own module document, plus a searchable decision journal with importance weights, all in the Logos/ folder of the Obsidian vault

plugins.name: plugin-builder
plugins.description: Creates, extends, and fixes plugins in the anton-toolkit-marketplace

plugins.name: system-designer
plugins.description: Iteratively design software systems and modules — orchestrates requirements, architecture, and module documentation inside a repo's docs/ folder

plugins.name: vibe-coding-course
plugins.description: Helps the teacher run a vibe-coding course: an interview-driven roadmap builder and a beginner-friendly per-lesson writer that save Russian Markdown files into the Obsidian vault's Курс/ folder

plugins.name: youtube-toolkit
plugins.description: Toolkit for running a Russian-language IT/vibe-coding YouTube channel: own-channel analytics, competitor analysis, idea generation, content planning, script writing, SEO, thumbnails, and on-channel lead generation
